description_long: This object is a compact, modern utility knife with a single-edged blade and a skeletonized handle. The blade features a pronounced drop point with a sharp tip and a large thumb hole near the spine for easy one-handed opening. The handle is integrated with the blade, featuring several cutouts that reduce weight and provide grip points. The entire object appears to be made from a single piece of metal, likely stainless steel, with a dark, matte finish. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative elements or separate handle scales. This knife is suitable for everyday carry or utility use in urban environments.
description: A compact, single-piece utility knife with a drop point blade and skeletonized handle, finished in dark matte metal.
description_view_0: Edge-on view showing the thin profile and uniform thickness of the knife.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the drop point blade, thumb hole, and skeletonized handle cutouts.
description_view_2: Opposite edge-on view, again highlighting the slim profile and flat construction.
description_view_3: Reverse side view showing the blade's shape and handle cutouts from the opposite direction.
attribute_handle_design: skeletonized, integrated metal, cutout grip, no scales
